title: GatewayMode
content:
# GatewayMode

The mode which the gateway is operates on. The default is `socket`, which uses a socket as an interface for the application to connect to the realtime data flow.

## Enum Values

- `socket`
- `legacy`
summary: The mode which the gateway is operates on. The default is `socket`, which uses a socket as an interface for the application to connect to the realtime data flow.
